Whono
A minimal Astro theme
for essays, notes, and docs.
Designed for reading,
open-source.

  • About

Astro Themes by Whono

This is an open-source writing theme and sample content library: it includes Essays, Memo, Archive, and Bits. See the README for usage and configuration. Find more posts on Archive or #Tags 。
